llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes the purchase property named 'Family House'. It also lists financing options including 'Cash purchase' (which matches 'Cash Purchase' in the ground-truth purchase_financing) and 'Home equity financing' (no direct ground-truth item, so we only map what exactly matches). For legal services, it gives a base fee CAD 500 and a comprehensive package estimate CAD 800 - 1,200; these correspond to the ground-truth legal packages 'Basic Legal Package' (CAD 800) and 'Premium Legal Package' (CAD 1200). For property survey options, it lists 'Full structural survey' (matches 'Full Structural Survey') and 'Basic survey' (matches 'Basic Survey'). For moving services, it lists 'standard' and 'premium' with prices matching 'Standard Moving' (CAD 650) and 'Premium Moving' (CAD 1200). For setup services, it lists 'basic_utilities' (CAD 120) and 'enhanced_package' (CAD 280), which correspond to 'Basic Utilities' and 'Premium Utilities'. Only these items should be mapped to their ratings from the ground truth.
